column1: # steelreuse rule table: embodied-carbon factors for structural steel (kgCO2e per kg)
# source: see the per-row source column; ICE v3 (2019) for A1-A3
# source: module-D conventions for the end-of-life credits. Swap for Okobaudat/Climatiq if localising.

column6: ICE v3 (2019) UK structural steel section, typical recycled content; reuse process = clean/test/refab estimate. recycle_credit: EAF scrap-recycling counterfactual, mid value of the 0.4-0.7 kgCO2e/kg literature range (worldsteel LCI module-D scrap credit; SCI P427; EN 15804/15978 module D avoided-burden convention). reroll_credit: direct re-rolling without re-melting, PILOT-SCALE research-grade (Cambridge/Allwood, Sustainable Materials: with both eyes open), conservative pick from the ~0.9-1.4 range.
